query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of peach and salmon-colored flower petals radiating from a bright yellow center, with visible stamens and anthers. The petals show warm orange-pink gradients blending toward yellow at the core, with green-tinged leaf edges visible in the periphery against a bright background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up of peach and salmon-colored flower petals radiating from a bright yellow center, rendered with a strong intentional radial blur that creates streaking motion effects from the center outward. The image is deliberately overexposed at the core, creating blown-out highlights that obscure fine detail and contribute to an abstract, dreamlike quality where the flower becomes a study in color and light rather than a clearly representational subject.
